info.name: School Management API
info.description:
Postman collection for School Management API — Add School and List Schools by proximity.

Base URL: http://localhost:8080

Replace {{base_url}} with your deployed URL when testing on production.

request.description: Check if the API server is running.
Adds a new school to the database. All four fields are required.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Tests validation — name is empty and longitude is missing.

response.name: 400 Bad Request
400 Bad Request

request.description: Returns all schools sorted by distance from the user's location (Bhopal). Nearest school appears first.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Tests that missing lat/lng query params return a 400 error.

response.name: 400 Bad Request
